query: SELECT id, symbol, strategy, isIndex, createdAt FROM watchlists WHERE userId = 1 AND symbol IN (SELECT symbol FROM watchlists WHERE userId = 1 GROUP BY symbol HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ORDER BY symbol, id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2m8TNWgPuPvRJRa.1b4cee6bb564 --database dA3LRtUEtHSvLVLz3WfwfJ --execute SELECT id, symbol, strategy, isIndex, createdAt FROM watchlists WHERE userId = 1 AND symbol IN (SELECT symbol FROM watchlists WHERE userId = 1 GROUP BY symbol HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) ORDER BY symbol, id;
